description: Drive your personal Microsoft 365 calendar from agentic workflows: read, write, sync, and run offline analytics like conflicts, freetime, and recurring-drift that no Graph endpoint exposes.

novel_features.name: Cross-calendar conflicts
novel_features.description: Find overlapping events across all your Outlook calendars in one pass — the double-bookings Outlook's own UI never shows.

novel_features.name: Free-time finder with working hours
novel_features.description: Compute N-minute gaps in your working hours over the next K days, honoring all calendars and optional OOF/tentative exclusion.

novel_features.name: Weekly review (change set)
novel_features.description: Diff against the last delta-sync snapshot: what was added, rescheduled, cancelled, or had its RSVP change.

novel_features.name: Pending invites
novel_features.description: List events whose RSVP is still pending and whose start time is in the future, ordered by start.

novel_features.name: Recurring drift
novel_features.description: For each recurring-series master, list instances whose start/end/subject/location diverged from the master pattern.

novel_features.name: Meeting prep dossier
novel_features.description: For upcoming events in the next N hours, return a dossier: subject, location, attendee emails, organizer, body excerpt, attachments list, recurrence/online-meeting flags.

novel_features.name: Attendee co-occurrence
novel_features.description: How often have I met with this person, and when did I see them last? Counts and recent N events from local store.

novel_features.name: Time-zone audit
novel_features.description: Surface events whose start time-zone differs from the calendar's default or from their own end-time TZ — likely-broken displays on other devices.
